scripts.portable: powershell -Command "$ver=(Select-String -Path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -Pattern '^version = \"(\d+\.\d+\.\d+)\"' | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value }); $exe='src-tauri/target/release/telegram-drive.exe'; $name='TelegramDrive_v'+$ver+'_portable'; if(Test-Path $exe){ Remove-Item -Force 'dist_portable' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'dist_portable' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item $exe 'dist_portable/Telegram Drive.exe'; $zipPath=Join-Path (Get-Location) ($name+'.zip'); Compress-Archive -Path 'dist_portable/*' -DestinationPath $zipPath -Force; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist_portable'; Write-Host ('Portable creado: '+$zipPath) -ForegroundColor Green }else{ Write-Host 'Primero ejecuta: npm run tauri build' -ForegroundColor Yellow }"
